{{Quote|I use my sword as a shield. They use their shields as swords.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Shatterpoint (novel)">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
The '''Akk Guards''' were [[Kar Vastor]]'s elite [[Upland Liberation Front]] warriors during the [[Summertime War]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

==Description==
Vastor personally trained these [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]], making them as animalistic as the [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] they were bonded to and teaching them how to use their signature weapon, their sharp-cutting [[vibroshield]]s. In addition to the akk dogs, the Guards were bonded to Vastor and each other. Vastor taught the Guards a deeper understanding and control of [[pelekotan]] than most Korunnai had. The Guards and Vastor used instinct, anger, and aggression. In a way, they were a dark mirror of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], even with their weapons, as observed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] during his [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|mission to Haruun Kal]].

==History==
When Master Windu was on Haruun Kal to find [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]], he found that she had joined Vastor and his guards. In the [[battle of Pelek Baw]] they put in danger to the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], but with the help of [[Nick Rostu]], Windu was able to defeat them.

Of the twelve, three were named [[Prouk]], [[Thaffal]], and [[Iolu]].

==Appearances==
